honest_boundary: This engine continuously PROPOSES and RANKS improvements. It AUTO-STAGES only the safe + reversible + canaried + selftest-gated subset (bounded config tunes, OFF-by-default new sources, additive watchdogs) as a SIGNED manifest through the existing pipe — the box's guardrail/canary/rollback owns the apply. Everything risky/irreversible/large is SURFACED here for your yes. It does NOT autonomously rewrite the system.

auto_safe_staged.title: Systems nominal — bank a small reliability hardening
auto_safe_staged.problem: No urgent signal anomalies this hour.
auto_safe_staged.proposed_change: Enable an additional idle-state watchdog on the lowest-coverage channel (additive, reversible) to keep raising the floor.
auto_safe_staged.expected_impact: Incremental reliability; keeps the engine producing.
auto_safe_staged.auto_reason: passed allowlist + denylist + reversibility + structural bound checks
